texto: The law is so complex and voluminousthat no one, not even the most knowledgeable lawyer, can understand itall. Moreover, lawyers and legal scholars have not gone out of their wayto make the law accessible to the ordinary person. Just the opposite: Legalprofessionals, like the priests of some obscure religion, too often try tokeep the law mysterious and inaccessible.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jay M. Feinman: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a sabedoria. O trecho “The law is so complex and voluminousthat no one, not even the most knowledgeable lawyer, can unde…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sabedoria, beuracracy, law pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de law e lawyers.
